rag_rules: Assumptions and guarantees must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Implementation-level bindings and assignments should be in implementation annexes after subcomponents and connections are defined
generic_rules: Fix unresolved references by ensuring all identifiers are declared or visible in the current scope
Validate that AGREE expressions have correct types (bool, int, real) matching their usage
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the model's configured dependencies
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Component implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings and assignments
anti_patterns: Placing assume/guarantee statements in component implementations instead of types
Using unresolved identifiers or invalid types in AGREE expressions
